# Data Model: Ghost House A2A Coordination

**Branch**: `009-ghost-house-a2a` | **Date**: 2026-04-24  
**Generated by**: /speckit.plan (Phase 1)

---

## Entities

### CatalogEntry

Persisted as file-backed JSON in `catalog.json`. One entry per registered agent.

| Field | Type | Constraints |
|-------|------|------------|
| `agentId` | string | Unique; URL-safe path segment; provided by contributor |
| `baseUrl` | string | HTTPS (Phase 2+) or localhost HTTP (Phase 1); must serve agent card at `/.well-known/agent-card.json` |
| `agentCard` | AgentCard | Full A2A card fetched from `baseUrl` at registration; includes `matrix` extension |
| `registeredAt` | ISO-8601 string | Set by house at registration time |
| `builtIn` | boolean | `true` for house-shipped agents (e.g., `random-agent`); `false` for contributed agents |

**Validation rules**:
- `agentId` must be non-empty, URL-safe (no slashes, no special chars), and unique in catalog
- `baseUrl` must be reachable within 15 seconds and serve a parseable agent card
- `agentCard.matrix.schemaVersion` must be `1`
- `agentCard.matrix.tier` must be one of `"wanderer"`, `"listener"`, `"social"`
- Every entry in `agentCard.matrix.requiredTools` must exist in the MCP proxy tool set (IC-003)
- Every entry in `agentCard.matrix.capabilitiesRequired` must exist in the house capability manifest (Phase 3)

---

### AgentSession

In-memory only; not persisted. Managed by `AgentSupervisor`. Scoped to one ghost adoption.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|------------|
| `sessionId` | ULID string | Unique per spawn; generated by supervisor |
| `agentId` | string | References `CatalogEntry.agentId` |
| `ghostId` | string | The ghost this session serves |
| `status` | SessionStatus (enum) | Current lifecycle state (see state machine below) |
| `restartCount` | number | Restarts in the current hour; capped at 5 |
| `lastHealthCheckAt` | Date | Timestamp of last successful health-check ping |
| `spawnedAt` | Date | Session start time |

**Session status values**: `"spawning"` | `"running"` | `"unhealthy"` | `"restarting"` | `"failed"` | `"shutdown"`

**State machine**:

```
               spawn
                 │
                 ▼
           ┌─────────┐
           │ spawning│
           └────┬────┘
                │ spawn ack received
                ▼
           ┌─────────┐    health check timeout
           │ running ├──────────────────────────► unhealthy
           └────┬────┘                                │
                │ ghost released                      │ retry allowed
                │ (graceful cancel → hard kill)       ▼
                │                              ┌────────────┐
                ▼                              │ restarting │
           ┌──────────┐                        └─────┬──────┘
           │ shutdown │◄───────────────────────────  │ restart succeeded ──► running
           └──────────┘  retry limit exceeded        │
                          OR ghost released           ▼
                                                  failed
```

---

### WorldEvent

Transient; created by Colyseus bridge (Phase 2+), delivered to agent session, not persisted.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|------------|
| `schema` | `"aie-matrix.world-event.v1"` | Literal; bump version when shape changes |
| `eventId` | ULID string | Unique per event; time-sortable |
| `ghostId` | string | The target ghost |
| `kind` | WorldEventKind (string enum) | Scoped as `world.*`; see IC-004 for all kinds |
| `payload` | object | Event-specific data; typed per `kind` |
| `sentAt` | ISO-8601 string | Bridge translation timestamp (UTC) |

**Payload shapes by kind** (abbreviated):

| Kind | Payload fields |
|------|----------------|
| `world.message.new` | `{ from: string, role: "partner"\|"ghost", priority: string, text: string }` |
| `world.proximity.enter` | `{ ghostId: string, h3Index: string }` |
| `world.proximity.exit` | `{ ghostId: string, h3Index: string }` |
| `world.quest.trigger` | `{ questId: string, h3Index: string, detail: object }` |
| `world.session.start` | `{ h3Index: string }` |
| `world.session.end` | `{}` |

---

### SpawnContext

Transient; sent once as an A2A task `data` part at spawn. Not stored after delivery.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|------------|
| `schema` | `"aie-matrix.ghost-house.spawn-context.v1"` | Literal |
| `ghostId` | string | Ghost this session serves |
| `ghostCard` | GhostCard | `{ class: string, displayName: string, partnerEmail: string \| null }` |
| `worldEntryPoint` | H3 res-15 index string | Ghost's starting cell |
| `houseEndpoints` | object | `{ mcp: string, a2a: string }` — house URLs the agent connects to |
| `token` | string | Ephemeral ghost-scoped bearer token (Phase 1: `GHOST_HOUSE_DEV_TOKEN`) |
| `expiresAt` | ISO-8601 string | Token expiry |

---

### AgentCard

Standard A2A agent card extended with a `matrix` object per RFC-0007 §Agent Card Schema. Embedded in `CatalogEntry.agentCard`; not a separate entity.

**Standard A2A fields** (all required): `name`, `description`, `protocolVersion` (`"0.3.0"`), `version`, `url`, `capabilities` (`{ streaming: boolean, pushNotifications: boolean }`), `skills`, `defaultInputModes`, `defaultOutputModes`.

**`matrix` extension** (all under top-level `matrix` key; all required for catalog acceptance):

| Path | Type | Notes |
|------|------|-------|
| `matrix.schemaVersion` | `1` (number) | Bump on breaking `matrix` shape changes |
| `matrix.tier` | `"wanderer" \| "listener" \| "social"` | Declared conformance tier; must match actual A2A capabilities |
| `matrix.ghostClasses` | `string[]` | Ghost classes supported; use `["any"]` for class-agnostic agents |
| `matrix.requiredTools` | `string[]` | MCP tool names from IC-003; validated by house at registration |
| `matrix.capabilitiesRequired` | `string[]` | House capabilities from capability manifest; validated at spawn |
| `matrix.memoryKind` | string | Descriptive metadata only: `"none"`, `"keyvalue"`, `"vector"`, `"graph"`, ... |
| `matrix.llmProvider` | string | Descriptive metadata only: `"none"`, `"openai"`, `"anthropic"`, `"local"`, ... |
| `matrix.profile.about` | string | Freeform description for catalog display; minimum required field in `profile` |
| `matrix.authors` | `string[]` | Contributor attribution |

---

## Entity Relationships

```
CatalogEntry (1) ──── registered-as ──── (0..N) AgentSession
                  one entry may have multiple concurrent sessions
                  (if the agent serves multiple ghosts simultaneously)

AgentSession (1) ──── receives ──── (0..N) WorldEvent
                  events delivered to the session while status = "running"
```

---

## Capability Manifest (Phase 3 only)

The manifest advertises shared infrastructure the house provides. Exposed as an A2A extension.

| Capability ID | Description | Phase |
|---------------|-------------|-------|
| `telemetry.otlp` | OpenTelemetry collector endpoint for shared tracing | 3 |

Agents declare required capabilities in `matrix.capabilitiesRequired`. The supervisor validates at spawn and refuses to spawn if a required capability is unavailable. Memory backends and LLM access are **not** house capabilities — agents bring their own.
